---
title: "Python Packages 2 : Package Strucutre"
author: "nshephard"
date: "2022-11-30"
categories: [code, analysis, python, packages, packaging, git, github, gitlab]
image: https://live.staticflickr.com/6089/6028541766_10939e3f1b_k.jpg
---

This is the second post in a series on Python Packaging that describes how to structure your Python Package in terms of
modules, sub-modules, tests and documentation.

# Links
